reviews.review_msg: Kind professor that's clearly passionate about what he teaches. Your exam mark reflects that the time and detail that you put in while reading his textbook. Participate as much as you can!! It'll make or break an AA+. Would absolutely take again, interesting class with a great professor.
Excellent proff.! Very laid back, calm class, but you still end up learning a lot. Absolutely fantastic!

Kind professor that's clearly passionate about what he teaches. Your exam mark reflects that the time and detail that you put in while reading his textbook. Participate as much as you can!! It'll make or break an AA+. Would absolutely take again, interesting class with a great professor.
Excellent proff.! Very laid back, calm class, but you still end up learning a lot. Absolutely fantastic!

Some math related to the physics of the atmosphere. There is almost no real physics; the math is sub high school level. There is lots of writing (paragraphs, essays). There is a report(worth 10%) about how climate change will affect construction of a new "model community". Poetry. ESL grad student marking. "Pointless busywork" says it all.
